heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: In the old days, if someone had a secret they didn't want to share... you know what they did?
clean: In the old days, if someone had a secret they didn't want to share... you know what they did?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Ah Ping: Have no idea.
clean: Have no idea.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: They went up a mountain, found a tree, carved a hole in it, and whispered the secret into the hole. Then they covered it with mud. And leave the secret there forever.
clean: They went up a mountain, found a tree, carved a hole in it, and whispered the secret into the hole. Then they covered it with mud. And leave the secret there forever.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Ah Ping: What a pain! I'd just go to get laid.
clean: What a pain! I'd just go to get laid.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: Not everyone's like you.
clean: Not everyone's like you.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: It's me. If there's an extra ticket... would you go with me?
clean: It's me. If there's an extra ticket... would you go with me?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: It's me. If there's an extra ticket... would you go with me?
clean: It's me. If there's an extra ticket... would you go with me?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: Am I hopeless?
clean: Am I hopeless?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: Not really.
clean: Not really.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: Why did you call me at the office today?
clean: Why did you call me at the office today?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: I had nothing to do. I wanted to hear your voice.
clean: I had nothing to do. I wanted to hear your voice.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: I have a chapter to finish.
clean: I have a chapter to finish.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: Where have you got to?
clean: Where have you got to?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: The drunken master just showed up.
clean: The drunken master just showed up.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: When did he get written in?
clean: When did he get written in?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: Just now!
clean: Just now!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: That handbag I saw you with this evening... Where did you buy it?
clean: That handbag I saw you with this evening... Where did you buy it?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: Why do you ask?
clean: Why do you ask?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: It looked so elegant. I want to get one for my wife.
clean: It looked so elegant. I want to get one for my wife.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: Mr. Chow, you're so good to your wife!
clean: Mr. Chow, you're so good to your wife!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: Not really! My wife is so fussy. Her birthday is some days away. I don't know what to get her. Could you buy one for me to give her?
clean: Not really! My wife is so fussy. Her birthday is some days away. I don't know what to get her. Could you buy one for me to give her?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: Maybe she wouldn't want one just exactly the same.
clean: Maybe she wouldn't want one just exactly the same.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: You're right, I didn't think of that.
clean: You're right, I didn't think of that.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: A woman would mind.
clean: A woman would mind.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: Yes, especially since we're neighbors. Do they come in other colors?
clean: Yes, especially since we're neighbors. Do they come in other colors?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: I'd have to ask my husband.
clean: I'd have to ask my husband.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: He bought it for me on a business trip abroad. They aren't on sale here.
clean: He bought it for me on a business trip abroad. They aren't on sale here.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: Then never mind.
clean: Then never mind.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: Actually... I want to ask you something too. Where did you buy your tie?
clean: Actually... I want to ask you something too. Where did you buy your tie?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: I don't know where it came from. My wife buys all my ties.
clean: I don't know where it came from. My wife buys all my ties.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: Really?
clean: Really?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: She bought this one on a business trip abroad. It's not on sale here.
clean: She bought this one on a business trip abroad. It's not on sale here.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: What a coincidence!
clean: What a coincidence!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: Actually... My husband has one just like it. He said it was a gift from his boss. So he wears it every day.
clean: Actually... My husband has one just like it. He said it was a gift from his boss. So he wears it every day.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: And my wife has a bag just like yours.
clean: And my wife has a bag just like yours.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: I know, I've seen it.
clean: I know, I've seen it.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: What are you getting at, actually?
clean: What are you getting at, actually?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: I thought I was the only one who knew.
clean: I thought I was the only one who knew.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: Why didn't you call me today?
clean: Why didn't you call me today?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: I was afraid you won't like it.
clean: I was afraid you won't like it.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: Then don't call me ever again.
clean: Then don't call me ever again.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: I sometimes wonder what I'd be if I hadn't married. Have you ever thought of that?
clean: I sometimes wonder what I'd be if I hadn't married. Have you ever thought of that?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: Maybe happier! I didn't know married life would be so complicated! When you're single, you are only responsible to yourself. Once you're married, doing well on your own is not enough.
clean: Maybe happier! I didn't know married life would be so complicated! When you're single, you are only responsible to yourself. Once you're married, doing well on your own is not enough.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: Look at me, do you have a mistress?
clean: Look at me, do you have a mistress?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Su Li-zhen: I didn't expect it to hurt that much.
clean: I didn't expect it to hurt that much.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chow Mo-wan: This is just a rehearsal.
clean: This is just a rehearsal.

heading: Captions
raw: He remembers those vanished years. As though looking through a dusty window pane, the past is something he could see, but not touch. And everything he sees is blurred and indistinct.
clean: He remembers those vanished years. As though looking through a dusty window pane, the past is something he could see, but not touch. And everything he sees is blurred and indistinct.

heading: Captions
raw: It is a restless moment. She has kept her head lowered... to give him a chance to come closer. But he could not, for lack of courage. She turns and walks away.
clean: It is a restless moment. She has kept her head lowered... to give him a chance to come closer. But he could not, for lack of courage. She turns and walks away.
